prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: FrikShun Image Studio candidate reference image
Primary request: Generate asset 002_three_quarter_left using the visible approved reference image 001_front_headshot_v1 as Chloe Katastrophe's identity reference.
Input images: The visible approved front headshot is the identity reference; preserve the same person, facial identity, age, eye shape, nose, lips, skin texture, freckles, hair color, and grounded realism. Do not copy the exact pose; create a new three-quarter-left portrait.
Subject: Chloe Katastrophe, adult woman, apparent age 24-26, primarily Slavic heritage, delicate Slavic facial structure, high cheekbones, soft jawline, straight nose, naturally full lips, subtle believable asymmetry, fair skin with natural texture and light freckles across nose and cheeks, dark chestnut to nearly black naturally wavy hair. Gray-green eyes with only subtle amber flecks as natural reflected warm light, never glowing.
Composition/framing: three-quarter-left close-up portrait, Chloe turns her face about 35-45 degrees to her left while her eyes remain softly aware of the camera or just past it. Intimate 85mm portrait crop, head and upper shoulders, natural perspective, shallow depth of field, no distortion.
Expression/body language: neutral observation, quiet curiosity, restrained melancholy, lived-in expression rather than performed. She appears as someone who has survived difficult things without becoming hardened; quiet resilience, approachable but never carefree; gaze suggests she is observing the present while remembering something distant.
Lighting/mood: soft window light with warm practical fill, cinematic but natural, discovered rather than staged, silence visible.
Color palette: warm skin tones, steel-blue shadows, amber highlights, deep charcoal and muted dark tones.
Style/medium: photorealistic portrait photography, natural skin texture, realistic hair, high identity clarity, not glamour retouched.
Constraints: Use the current visual canon from studio/chloe-model/appearance.md. Preserve Chloe's approved identity from 001_front_headshot_v1 while changing the pose to three-quarter-left. She must appear clearly adult, human, grounded, authentic rather than perfect.
negative_prompt: Avoid: childish, naive, anime, cartoon, superhero, fantasy, cyberpunk stereotype, robot, exposed machinery, influencer selfie, glamour model, fashion-model styling, glossy futuristic armor, excessive accessories, overly sexualized, hyper-aggressive, plastic-perfect skin, porcelain perfection, harsh studio flash, oversaturated neon, nightclub aesthetics, fisheye, extreme wide-angle distortion, watermark, text.
notes: Outstanding three-quarter identity reference with excellent continuity to Image 001. Captures Chloe's mature, attentive, quietly resilient presence with natural hair movement, realistic skin texture, and restrained emotional expression. This should become one of the primary facial reference images for future portrait, video, and album artwork generation.
